ChangeRequest.name: Debt security issued - hedged by... OTC or exchange tradable derivative
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview In BIRD 6.5 you have the entities: **Instrument hedged by Over the counter (OTC) Derivative** and **Security position hedged by Over the counter (OTC) derivative**
You also have: **Instrument hedged by exchange tradable derivative position** and **Security position hedged by exchange tradable derivative position**
However, I miss the concept for a Debt security issued..._hedged by Over the counter (OTC) derivative_
In the current model version, it is not possible to show a debt security issued that is hedged by an (OTC) derivative. Likewise, it is not possible to show a debt security issued that is hedged by an exchange tradable derivative position.
Illustration of the Debt security relation with Otc derivative ![image](/uploads/e180cd781ac5a1d71094d6d3e3abbda9/image.png) ### Contact person _[m.peters80@gmail.com]_
### Business definition _[Business requirements]_
### Legal definition _[Legal reference]_
### Reason for inclusion _Model is not complete_
### Relationships _[Related objects]_
### Relevant Framework/Template FinRep F 11.04 Annex V.Part 2.146, 147 IFRS 7.24B(a)
### Additional documentation/links (optional) _[Additional info]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
